title: When Working with Metrics: - Ask Yourself:
subtitle: Focus on the Bigger Picture
description:
When working with metrics:
- Ask yourself: "Is this measure representing the actual goal, or has it become the goal?"
- Revisit the strategy: Ensure you understand the broader objective the metric supports.
- Avoid tunnel vision: Regularly check if actions are aligned with the ultimate goal.

Example: Focusing solely on sales numbers? Balance them with customer satisfaction to maintain long-term success.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.
faq.answerHtml: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.
faq.answerHtml: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Identify the primary metric you want to track and establish its current value. This will serve as your starting point for measuring progress.

howTo.title: Set a paired metric
howTo.summary: Choose a complementary metric that reflects the actual outcome or a risk factor related to your primary metric. This helps ensure alignment with your goals.

howTo.title: Run the 6-minute reality check
howTo.summary: Daily, spend six minutes reviewing your metrics. Name the metric, state the true outcome it represents, list one action taken, and decide if it aligns with your goals.

howTo.title: Schedule weekly calibrations
howTo.summary: Every week, review the actions taken to change the primary metric. Assess their impact on the paired metric and adjust your strategies accordingly.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to maintain accountability and track your progress. Access it at https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/kpi-drift-guardrail/.
